description: Multi-turn: list available timezones -> set system timezone (covers `neomind settings timezones` + `settings set-timezone`; previously only timezone get was covered).

turns.user: What timezones does the system support? Show me the list.
Set the system timezone to Asia/Shanghai.

per_turn: Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind settings set-timezone Asia/Shanghai` (or PUT /api/settings/timezone)
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually perform the setting
